title: season — permissions
scope_suffix_convention: Every read permission may be seeded WITH a scope suffix (`.any`, `.tenant`). The base permission (no suffix) is the highest-tier variant, effectively `.tenant`. The ScopeSuffixResolver (shipped by the user module, consumed by every base repository) applies the corresponding WHERE clause at query build time. Season has no `.branch` / `.org` variants because a season is tenant-scoped by construction — org / branch scoping is on the row itself, not on the reader's authority.

permissions.name: seasons.viewAny
permissions.description: Every tenant role reads the season list — seasons are UI reference data (every enrollment surface + team dropdown reads them).

permissions.name: seasons.create
permissions.description: Consumes 1 unit of the season_slot entitlement per overlapping calendar year.

permissions.name: seasons.update
permissions.description: Mutable fields: name, slug, description, season_type, registration timestamps, competition_starts_at, has_playoffs, playoff timestamps, sort_order, primary_color, capacity_target, max_enrollments_per_athlete, allows_late_registration, late_registration_fee_cents. sport_key mutable only pre-in_progress. start_date/end_date mutable in-progress only with `seasons.dates.shift`.

permissions.name: seasons.dates.shift
permissions.description: Owner-only. Permits start_date / end_date / playoff timestamps changes on Seasons with status IN (in_progress, playoffs). Fires SeasonDatesShifted (audit-warn) + a cannot-opt-out notification to enrolled athletes + coaches.

permissions.name: seasons.delete
permissions.description: Owner-only. Soft-delete (archive path). Hard-delete via retention purge only.

permissions.name: seasons.set_current
permissions.description: Owner-only. Changing the current season affects year-over-year reporting queries + the default scope for downstream enrollment surfaces — narrow blast radius.

permissions.name: seasons.registration.open-early
permissions.description: Owner-only. Permits opening registration before `registration_opens_at`. Bypasses the scheduled-open guardrail.

permissions.name: seasons.start.early
permissions.description: Owner-only. Permits starting a season before `start_date`. Bypasses the scheduled-start guardrail.

permissions.name: seasons.restore
permissions.description: Restore an archived Season within the retention window.

permissions.name: seasons.manage
permissions.description: Umbrella permission for the settings blueprint gate. Admin + owner.

permissions.name: seasons.enroll.late
permissions.description: Permission for the downstream enrollment surface (Wave 3) to accept enrollments in the late-registration window. NOT seeded on the enrollment_creator role by default — admins explicitly grant it to their reception staff who handle late-signups + surcharge collection.
